# Macro Outlook Tracker: 2026-04-15

## Core CPI YoY (%)

### Goldman Sachs — April Inflation Monitor
**Source:** Goldman Sachs
**Source URL:** https://internal.example/gs-cpi-apr
**Source date:** 2026-04-10
**Value:** 2.8
**Unit:** %
**Horizon:** 12m forward
**Stance:** bearish
**Conviction:** high
**Key claim:** Core CPI to decelerate to 2.8% by Q2 2027 as shelter disinflation broadens.
**Evidence:** "We see core CPI printing 2.8% at the 12m horizon, driven by shelter disinflation."

### JPMorgan — Inflation Outlook Weekly
**Source:** JPMorgan
**Source URL:** https://internal.example/jpm-inflation-apr
**Source date:** 2026-04-11
**Value:** 3.2
**Unit:** %
**Horizon:** 12m forward
**Stance:** bullish
**Conviction:** med
**Key claim:** Services inflation remains sticky; core CPI likely stalls near 3.2% through mid-2027.
**Evidence:** "Sticky services inflation points to core CPI near 3.2% in 12 months."
